title: azalea campylogyna
intro: Azalea campylogyna, also known as the 'cluster azalea', is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Azalea campylogyna include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
